evidence: Three concrete observable symptoms listed: duplicate ingestion, no source/blob link, no recoverability on failure.
Observable symptom phrase: 'при повторном запуске система не может отличить новые объекты от уже собранных'
Stakeholder named as 'компонент оркестрации ingestion (sync-оркестратор, фоновые jobs)'
Motivation clearly tied to idempotent ingestion impossibility
§4 mentions 'app/models/', 'db/migrate/', 'ActiveRecord' as technical context — borderline but acceptable as env constraints
No class names, column names, or schema structure proposed
dimensions.fix_expectation: Minor: §4 file paths and 'ActiveRecord' are acceptable as architectural constraints describing current state, not solution design. No fix required unless reviewer deems it blocking.

evidence: Criterion 1: 'Поведение при дубле (перезапись или обновление полей или пропуск с логом) задокументировано и единообразно' — the semantics are left as an unresolved alternative, not a defined behavior.
This violates the Undefined-term gate: the term 'поведение при дубле' is not grounded in an observable outcome.
dimensions.fix_expectation: Either (a) pick one semantics — upsert-overwrite OR skip-with-log — and state it as the chosen behavior; or (b) move the choice to an explicit blocking open question before the document can be approved.

evidence: No exclusion conflicts with success criteria
